hero.headline: 15+ years in web app and game development
hero.supportCopy: I build polished web applications that combine thoughtful front-end design with strong underlying systems.

about.heading: A background in games, teaching, and web development.
paragraphs: I started coding through game development in middle school and have now been building games and web applications for over 15 years. Along the way, I taught coding through charter school classes, a youth program, and adult workshops, while building many of my own projects from scratch. More recently, that work has included web projects for clients as well as ambitious application-focused projects of my own, including complex AI tools for teaching programming concepts.
That background shaped how I approach development now: with a strong focus on structure, usability, dynamic systems, and user experience.

interactive.heading: Games & Interactive Work
interactive.intro: A selection of projects that reflect my background in game development and my continued focus on dynamic systems, animated interfaces, and interaction design.
interactive.legacyIntro: Before moving into web development, I spent years building games from scratch, handling gameplay systems, custom physics, and much of the art and animation myself.

ui.embeddedVideoNote: Embedded walkthrough video with instant stop on close.

featured.title: VR Rhythm Drumming Game
featured.meta: In Development - Web VR - Gameplay Systems
featured.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Rhythm Drumming VR Game project

card.summary: A rhythm-based drumming game in development for the web, built around timing, movement, and intuitive physical player interaction.
card.detail: The game is designed to read user intention through small, natural movements, creating a more intuitive drumming experience. Instead of relying on exact hand positions to detect hits, it aims to simulate real stick motion, where drumming often involves finger control and a slight 'throwing' motion into the drum so the stick can rebound naturally. This approach helps the interaction feel more realistic while also reducing arm fatigue, a common issue in this type of game.

dialog.summary: A rhythm-based drumming game in development for the web, built around timing, movement, and intuitive physical player interaction.
dialog.detail: The game is designed to read user intention through small, natural movements, creating a more intuitive drumming experience. Instead of relying on exact hand positions to detect hits, it aims to simulate real stick motion, where drumming often involves finger control and a slight 'throwing' motion into the drum so the stick can rebound naturally. This approach helps the interaction feel more realistic while also reducing arm fatigue, a common issue in this type of game.

legacy.title: Blood Red
legacy.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Blood Red game project

card.summary: A stylized zombie survival shooter focused on accurate hit reactions, enemy pressure, and fast-response combat feel.

dialog.summary: A stylized zombie survival shooter built from scratch, focused on accurate hit reactions, enemy pressure, and fast-response combat feel.
dialog.detail: In this project I focused on implementing location-aware damage response in enemies, and the feel of fast, reactive combat with slower, precise mechanics to create tense gameplay.

legacy.title: Toxic Tides
legacy.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Toxic Tides game project

card.summary: An underwater survival shooter built around enemy variety, movement patterns, balanced upgrades, and performance under heavier load.

dialog.summary: An underwater survival shooter built around enemy variety, movement patterns, balanced upgrades, and performance under heavier load for intense waves of enemies.
dialog.detail: Development never fully completed, but the concept was ambitions - with a large variety of enemies already planned and animated, each with unique movement patterns and behaviors. Assets were also created for unique boss battles and different settings. Would like to return to this project in the future - If interested, reach out!

legacy.title: Droid Team
legacy.imageAlt: Screenshot of the Droid Team game project

card.summary: A puzzle-platform game built around teamwork mechanics, custom physics, and tightly controlled level design.

dialog.summary: A puzzle-platform game built around teamwork mechanics, custom physics, and tightly controlled level design.
dialog.detail: It focused on puzzle communication, rule clarity, and level design that had to stay tight and deliberate.
